title: Franck Zibi
text: Home * People * Franck Zibi Franck Zibi [1] Franck Zibi , a French computer scientist, chess player, and senior developer at Societe Generale Corporate and Investment Banking [2] . As computer chess programmer, he is author of the chess programs HpChess for the HP48 calculators family written in C , and its successors, the WinBoard compatible engines ZChess and Pharaon , both written in C++ , the latter also UCI conform.
